summary: Council Ordinance 191234 reduces ADU max count in RM3 zones from 4 to 2.

payload.title: Inner Northeast ADU density rollback
payload.summary: Reduces ADU max count from 4 to 2 in RM3-zoned lots within the Albina Plan area.

summary: New design overlay zone 'd' applied to NE Broadway corridor parcels.

payload.title: NE Broadway design overlay extension
payload.summary: Applies the design (d) overlay to CX-zoned parcels along NE Broadway between 7th and 16th.

summary: RM2 lot-coverage cap raised from 50% to 60% in qualifying transit corridors.

payload.title: Transit corridor lot coverage update
payload.summary: Raises lot coverage from 50% to 60% for RM2 parcels within 0.25 miles of frequent transit.
